metadata.title: LaneBundleRule — rule metadata within a lane finding bundle

description: Rule metadata attached to the context bundle in a delegated Assisted Remediation finding (ADR-109 #653). Nested inside LaneBundle. Crosses the API boundary as part of LaneFindingWithBundle (ADR-056 D7 criterion 6). Authority: ADR-056 Wave 3 (#366). Source: src/api/v1/schemas.py, class LaneBundleRule.

id.description: The rule_id from .intent/rules/ that produced this finding. Null if not resolvable.

rationale.description: The rule's rationale text from its intent declaration. Null if not found in registry.

in_registry.description: Whether the rule_id was found in the live IntentRepository rule registry.
